test-case.description: writes an XML error log that records the configuration error
test-case.name: Configuration error XML logging.writes an XML error log that records the configuration error

test-case.description: returns the default object property value when the input object is null
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns the default object property value when the input object is null

test-case.description: returns false when checking explicit includes against null selection
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns false when checking explicit includes against null selection

test-case.description: throws when protectedTasks has an empty taskName
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws when protectedTasks has an empty taskName

test-case.description: throws when .env contains a malformed line without equals
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws when .env contains a malformed line without equals

test-case.description: throws when .env contains an empty key
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws when .env contains an empty key

test-case.description: skips log cleanup when logs folder is missing
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.skips log cleanup when logs folder is missing

test-case.description: returns disabled mail settings for missing configuration-error selection path
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns disabled mail settings for missing configuration-error selection path

test-case.description: returns disabled mail settings when configuration-error JSON has no mail block
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns disabled mail settings when configuration-error JSON has no mail block

test-case.description: uses a single mail entry for configuration-error fallback
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.uses a single mail entry for configuration-error fallback

test-case.description: throws when more than two mail event entries are supplied
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws when more than two mail event entries are supplied

test-case.description: throws when an unsupported mail event value is supplied
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws when an unsupported mail event value is supplied

test-case.description: returns the plain Mail object when result and error wrappers are absent
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns the plain Mail object when result and error wrappers are absent

test-case.description: returns false for null mail settings readiness
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns false for null mail settings readiness

test-case.description: returns an empty attachment list when no attachments are enabled
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.returns an empty attachment list when no attachments are enabled

test-case.description: throws from direct mail sender when there are no recipients
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws from direct mail sender when there are no recipients

test-case.description: throws from direct mail sender when an attachment is missing
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.throws from direct mail sender when an attachment is missing

test-case.description: builds an error XML log when the error record is plain text-like
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard coverage branch tests.builds an error XML log when the error record is plain text-like

test-case.description: resolves an empty XML log path to logs folder with current date/time filename
test-case.name: Default XML log path behavior.resolves an empty XML log path to logs folder with current date/time filename

test-case.description: keeps the provided XML log path unchanged
test-case.name: Default XML log path behavior.keeps the provided XML log path unchanged

test-case.description: writes to logs folder with timestamp when Write-WtcgDisableXmlLog receives no path
test-case.name: Default XML log path behavior.writes to logs folder with timestamp when Write-WtcgDisableXmlLog receives no path

test-case.description: builds a log-generated email body that references the XML log
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.builds a log-generated email body that references the XML log

test-case.description: builds an error email body that references the XML log and error message
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.builds an error email body that references the XML log and error message

test-case.description: log-generated notification attempts to attach the XML log when requested
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.log-generated notification attempts to attach the XML log when requested

test-case.description: error notification attempts to attach the XML log when requested
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.error notification attempts to attach the XML log when requested

test-case.description: notification helpers warn instead of throwing when email send fails by default
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.notification helpers warn instead of throwing when email send fails by default

test-case.description: notification helpers can fail the operation when FailOnEmailError is set
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard email body helpers.notification helpers can fail the operation when FailOnEmailError is set

test-case.description: imports mail settings from SelectionPath JSON
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.imports mail settings from SelectionPath JSON

test-case.description: treats missing mail settings as disabled
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.treats missing mail settings as disabled

test-case.description: builds attachment list from JSON mail settings for XML log and identity file
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.builds attachment list from JSON mail settings for XML log and identity file

test-case.description: does not attach identity file when attachIdentityFile is false
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.does not attach identity file when attachIdentityFile is false

test-case.description: dispatches log-generated notification from JSON settings with configured attachments
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.dispatches log-generated notification from JSON settings with configured attachments

test-case.description: dispatches error notification from JSON settings with configured attachments
test-case.name: JSON mail configuration.dispatches error notification from JSON settings with configured attachments

test-case.description: imports KEY=VALUE pairs from a .env file and ignores comments/blanks
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.imports KEY=VALUE pairs from a .env file and ignores comments/blanks

test-case.description: returns null when LOG_RETENTION is not configured
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.returns null when LOG_RETENTION is not configured

test-case.description: throws when LOG_RETENTION is not a whole number
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.throws when LOG_RETENTION is not a whole number

test-case.description: throws when LOG_RETENTION is negative
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.throws when LOG_RETENTION is negative

test-case.description: deletes XML logs older than LOG_RETENTION days and keeps newer XML logs
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.deletes XML logs older than LOG_RETENTION days and keeps newer XML logs

test-case.description: skips cleanup when .env file is missing
test-case.name: .env log retention cleanup.skips cleanup when .env file is missing

test-case.description: imports safetyAllowListMode from SelectionPath JSON
test-case.name: Safety allow-list mode.imports safetyAllowListMode from SelectionPath JSON

test-case.description: throws before scanning when safety allow-list mode is enabled without includes
test-case.name: Safety allow-list mode.throws before scanning when safety allow-list mode is enabled without includes

test-case.description: allows scanning when safety allow-list mode has includeTasks
test-case.name: Safety allow-list mode.allows scanning when safety allow-list mode has includeTasks

test-case.description: allows scanning when safety allow-list mode has includeFolders
test-case.name: Safety allow-list mode.allows scanning when safety allow-list mode has includeFolders

test-case.description: directly allows explicit includes through Assert-WtcgSafetyAllowListSatisfied
test-case.name: Safety allow-list mode.directly allows explicit includes through Assert-WtcgSafetyAllowListSatisfied

test-case.description: returns built-in protected folder selections
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.returns built-in protected folder selections

test-case.description: treats Microsoft UpdateOrchestrator tasks as protected by default
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.treats Microsoft UpdateOrchestrator tasks as protected by default

test-case.description: lets callers disable the built-in protected task list explicitly
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.lets callers disable the built-in protected task list explicitly

test-case.description: treats user-defined protected folders as protected
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.treats user-defined protected folders as protected

test-case.description: treats user-defined protected tasks as protected by wildcard name
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.treats user-defined protected tasks as protected by wildcard name

test-case.description: protected tasks are blocked even when explicitly included
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.protected tasks are blocked even when explicitly included

test-case.description: candidate discovery filters out built-in protected tasks
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.candidate discovery filters out built-in protected tasks

test-case.description: imports protectedFolders and protectedTasks from SelectionPath JSON
test-case.name: Protected never-disable task policy.imports protectedFolders and protectedTasks from SelectionPath JSON

test-case.description: finds tasks, disables them, writes identities, and creates a re-enable scheduled task when one does not exist
test-case.name: Disable-WtcgTasksInWindowAndScheduleReenable orchestration.finds tasks, disables them, writes identities, and creates a re-enable scheduled task when one does not exist

test-case.description: updates the existing re-enable scheduled task trigger when the task already exists
test-case.name: Disable-WtcgTasksInWindowAndScheduleReenable orchestration.updates the existing re-enable scheduled task trigger when the task already exists

test-case.description: returns without disabling or scheduling when no tasks are inside the window
test-case.name: Disable-WtcgTasksInWindowAndScheduleReenable orchestration.returns without disabling or scheduling when no tasks are inside the window

test-case.description: supports WhatIf so tasks are found and identities are exported without disabling or scheduling
test-case.name: Disable-WtcgTasksInWindowAndScheduleReenable orchestration.supports WhatIf so tasks are found and identities are exported without disabling or scheduling

test-case.description: directly accepts one result and one error event through Assert-WtcgMailEventSettings
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.directly accepts one result and one error event through Assert-WtcgMailEventSettings

test-case.description: uses one mail entry for both result and error notifications
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.uses one mail entry for both result and error notifications

test-case.description: uses separate result and error entries when event values are provided
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.uses separate result and error entries when event values are provided

test-case.description: throws when two mail entries are provided and one is missing event
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.throws when two mail entries are provided and one is missing event

test-case.description: throws when two mail entries do not contain exactly one result and one error event
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.throws when two mail entries do not contain exactly one result and one error event

test-case.description: imports split mail settings from SelectionPath JSON when events are valid
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.imports split mail settings from SelectionPath JSON when events are valid

test-case.description: imports fallback error mail settings for configuration errors
test-case.name: Strict split JSON mail configuration.imports fallback error mail settings for configuration errors

test-case.description: parses an ISO date/time string as an exact DateTime
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.parses an ISO date/time string as an exact DateTime

test-case.description: anchors a time-only string to the provided anchor date
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.anchors a time-only string to the provided anchor date

test-case.description: anchors a time-only string with AM/PM to the provided anchor date
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.anchors a time-only string with AM/PM to the provided anchor date

test-case.description: throws for unparseable date/time input
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.throws for unparseable date/time input

test-case.description: resolves a same-day window
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.resolves a same-day window

test-case.description: resolves an overnight window by adding a day to End
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.resolves an overnight window by adding a day to End

test-case.description: treats date/times inside the window as in-window inclusively
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.treats date/times inside the window as in-window inclusively

test-case.description: treats date/times outside the window as outside
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard pure date/time helpers.treats date/times outside the window as outside

test-case.description: normalizes null, empty, relative, and slashless task paths

test-case.description: throws when folder selection object has no path
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard task path and folder selection helpers.throws when folder selection object has no path

test-case.description: creates a task identity with normalized path and full name

test-case.description: imports a bare array of task identities

test-case.description: throws when importing a missing identity file
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard task identity import/export helpers.throws when importing a missing identity file

test-case.description: throws when selection JSON is invalid

test-case.description: throws when a task include has an empty taskName

test-case.description: matches task specs by exact folder and wildcard task name

test-case.description: does not match task specs when folder differs

test-case.description: matches recursive folder selections against descendants

test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard selection JSON import and matching.matches non-recursive folder selections only against exact folders

test-case.description: allows all tasks when selection is null
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard selection JSON import and matching.allows all tasks when selection is null

test-case.description: allows task when include folder matches and no exclusion matches
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard selection JSON import and matching.allows task when include folder matches and no exclusion matches

test-case.description: allows task when include task spec matches and no exclusion matches

test-case.description: blocks task when includes exist but none match

test-case.description: allows task when only exclusions exist and none match

test-suite.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module
test-suite.description: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module

test-case.description: gets only exact-folder command-line candidates when Recurse is not used
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module.gets only exact-folder command-line candidates when Recurse is not used

test-case.description: includes disabled candidates when IncludeDisabled is used
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module.includes disabled candidates when IncludeDisabled is used

test-case.description: uses command-line recurse by scanning all tasks and filtering paths
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module.uses command-line recurse by scanning all tasks and filtering paths

test-case.description: adds selection include folders with their own recurse settings

test-case.description: adds explicitly included tasks from selection and de-duplicates results

test-case.description: filters candidate names using TaskName wildcards

test-case.description: finds in-window tasks and returns rich records by default

test-case.description: finds in-window tasks and returns identity-only records

test-case.description: skips tasks with no upcoming run
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module.skips tasks with no upcoming run

test-case.description: warns and skips tasks whose info cannot be read
test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard scheduled task discovery with mocked ScheduledTasks module.warns and skips tasks whose info cannot be read

test-case.description: starts task identities from the pipeline and returns identities

test-case.name: WinTaskCrossingGuard manifest output.writes null selection source when no selection is provided

test-case.description: ships all wrapper scripts expected by the suite

test-case.description: wrapper scripts parse without syntax errors
test-case.name: Wrapper script availability.wrapper scripts parse without syntax errors

test-case.description: writes an XML log with timestamp, window, metadata, and disabled task entries

test-case.description: omits optional metadata when optional values are absent
